
### Stationary

slow charge movement localisation in vacuum (conservativ system), also timeindependent fields amplitues $\mathscr{E}_0, \mathscr{B}_0, j_0, \varrho_0$ : 

$$\begin{split} &
\nabla \cdot \varepsilon_0 \mathscr{E} = \varrho \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad
\nabla \cdot \mathscr{B} = 0 
\newline &
\nabla \times \mathscr{E} = -\frac{\partial}{\partial t} \mathscr{B} = i\omega\mathscr{B}  \qquad
\nabla \times \frac{1}{\mu_0} \mathscr{B} = j + 
\underbrace{
    \varepsilon_0 \frac{\partial}{\partial t} \mathscr{E} 
}_\text{Exitation Displacement}
= j - 
\underbrace{
    i\omega\varepsilon_0\mathscr{E}
}_\text{Exitation Displacement}
\end{split}$${#eq-EMF_vac_stationar}

Potentials:
$$
\Phi_e = ... \\
\mathscr{A} = ...
$$

Fields:
$$
\mathscr{E} = ... \\
\mathscr{B} = ...
$$
